name: Pumpkin Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Farmers cheese -OR- hoop or ricotta cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Remove outer skin of the pumpkin using a paring knife or vegetable peeler.
3. Slice the pumpkin into 1/4-inch slices and place in a mixing bowl.
4. Add onion, salt, pepper, and butter; toss well.
5. Pour contents into a greased 9-inch round or square baking dish.
6. Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, beat eggs, milk, and cheese together until smooth.
8. Remove baking dish from oven and pour cheese mixture over top.
9. Replace cover and return to oven; bake an additional 20 minutes.
10. The gratin is done when it turns golden brown.
